name: Capchase
description: Embedded financing API for SaaS and B2B purchase financing with non-dilutive capital.

seo.title: Capchase — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Capchase: Embedded financing API for SaaS and B2B purchase financing with non-dilutive capital.

when_to_use: Embedded financing for B2B SaaS buyers to pay annually upfront
Non-dilutive revenue-based financing for SaaS ARR
Offering extended payment terms to enterprise prospects via financing API
Reducing sales cycle friction with embedded purchase financing at checkout

review.verdict: Financing layer — useful for B2B SaaS offering payment terms, not a general payment processor.
review.best_for: B2B SaaS vendors offering financed annual contracts to customers
review.not_for: B2C merchants or teams needing core card processing

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
